LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, JUN-30-2021 HEARING HELD RE: DEFENDANT CRUSADER INSURANCE COMPANY'S DEMURRER TO THE COMPLAINT. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. THE DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. (SEE MINI-MINUTES FOR DETAILS.) COUNSEL FOR THE DEFENDANT IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE COURT'S RULING. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN; CLERK: SEAN KANE; COURT REPORTER: ERIC THRONE, CSR NO. 7855, EMAIL: ERIC.THRONE.CSR@GMAIL.COM, TEL: 707-305-8964 (302/EPS)

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-30-2021 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-30-2021 Continued To Oct-20-21 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-30-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. KATIE J. SPIELMAN, Esq. of DL Law Group (Tel: 415-678-5050) for plaintiff;
Atty. SAMUEL DUIMOVICH, Esq. of Sheppard, Mullin, Richter & Hampton LLP (Tel: 619-338-6500) for defendant Crusader Insurance Company.

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT CRUSADER INSURANCE COMPANY'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendant Crusader Insurance Company's demurrer to the complaint is sustained without leave to amend. (See Code Civ. Proc. sec. 430.10(e) [failure to state a cause of action].) (See Word minutes for complete ruling.)

Counsel for the defendant is required to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Eric Throne, CSR No. 7855, Email: eric.throne.csr@gmail.com, Tel: 707-305-8964 (302/EPS)
